title: Connected Apps
description: These are the apps and websites you've given permission to use your account. You can remove access to any app you no longer use or trust.

empty_state.title: No Connected Apps
empty_state.description: You haven't connected any apps or websites to your account yet.

confirm.remove_all: Are you sure you want to remove access for all connected apps? This cannot be undone.
confirm.remove_single: Are you sure you want to remove access for "{{appName}}"? This cannot be undone.
